aggro_flanker_1.name: Flanker
aggro_flanker_1.textShort: If nearby ally slot empty: +1 ATK.

aggro_scout_1.name: Scout
aggro_scout_1.textShort: On play: block enemy unit play here this turn.

aggro_rush_1.name: Rush
aggro_rush_1.textShort: Swap with adjacent ally; fight that lane.

aggro_pierce_strike_1.name: Pierce Strike
aggro_pierce_strike_1.textShort: Deal 1. Next combat hit ignores its armor.

aggro_adrenaline_1.name: Adrenaline
aggro_adrenaline_1.textShort: Pick ally: resolve combat in its lane now.

aggro_quick_fix_1.name: Quick Fix
aggro_quick_fix_1.textShort: Ally: heal 1, +1 ATK this turn. Draw if it kills.

attrition_swarm_husk_1.name: Husk
attrition_swarm_husk_1.textShort: Combat death: deal 1 to enemy in lane.

attrition_swarm_leech_1.name: Leech
attrition_swarm_leech_1.textShort: Combat kill and survive: heal hero 1.

attrition_swarm_rotcaller_1.name: Rotcaller
attrition_swarm_rotcaller_1.textShort: First adjacent ally combat death: +1 ATK.

attrition_swarm_funeral_pyre_1.name: Funeral Pyre
attrition_swarm_funeral_pyre_1.textShort: First 2 ally combat deaths hit enemy in lane 1.

attrition_swarm_infect_1.name: Infect
attrition_swarm_infect_1.textShort: Deal 1 to enemy. If survives, opposite ally +1 ATK.

attrition_swarm_rise_again_1.name: Rise Again
attrition_swarm_rise_again_1.textShort: Revive first discarded unit at 1 HP.

control_hacker_1.name: Hacker
control_hacker_1.textShort: Enemy in lane -1 ATK this turn.

control_disruptor_1.name: Disruptor
control_disruptor_1.textShort: On play: cancel next enemy effect this turn.

control_swap_1.name: Swap
control_swap_1.textShort: Swap any two units on one side.

control_pulse_wave_1.name: Pulse Wave
control_pulse_wave_1.textShort: Deal 1 to all enemies ignoring armor.

control_system_override_1.name: System Override
control_system_override_1.textShort: Target enemy attacks its own hero in next combat, then takes 1 damage.

swarm_spitter_1.name: Spitter
swarm_spitter_1.textShort: On play: deal 1 to enemy in lane.

swarm_spawn_1.name: Spawn
swarm_spawn_1.textShort: Summon 1/1 in first empty ally slot.

swarm_regrow_1.name: Regrow
swarm_regrow_1.textShort: Revive first discarded unit at 1 HP.

swarm_flood_1.name: Flood
swarm_flood_1.textShort: Fill 2 empty ally slots with 0/1 Tokens.

tank_shieldbearer_1.name: Shieldbearer
tank_shieldbearer_1.textShort: Adjacent allies have +1 ARM in combat.

tank_guardian_1.name: Guardian
tank_guardian_1.textShort: Intercepts combat damage for adjacent ally.

tank_bruiser_1.name: Bruiser
tank_bruiser_1.textShort: When damaged and survives: +1 ATK this turn.

tank_stability_1.name: Stability
tank_stability_1.textShort: Allies can’t be moved/disabled this turn.

tank_last_stand_1.name: Last Stand
tank_last_stand_1.textShort: Allies can’t drop below 1 HP this turn.

tank_repair_kit_1.name: Reactive Plating
tank_repair_kit_1.textShort: Target ally +1 ARM until combat ends.

wardens_brace_1.name: Brace
wardens_brace_1.textShort: Target ally +1 ARM until combat ends.

wardens_stand_firm_1.name: Stand Firm
wardens_stand_firm_1.textShort: All allies can’t be moved this turn.

wardens_reinforce_line_1.name: Reinforce Line
wardens_reinforce_line_1.textShort: Leftmost ally +1 ARM until combat ends.

wardens_hold_the_line_1.name: Hold The Line
wardens_hold_the_line_1.textShort: Leftmost 2 allies +1 ARM until combat ends.
